concept: Calibrating autonomy claims — 'unattended CI was unblocked' is not 'the autonomous loop is working'
content:
LESSON (Article 1 Truthfulness + Article 9 Bounded Autonomy): when reporting on an autonomous drive, separate the capability that was genuinely restored from the capability that was merely exercised under supervision. A session on 2026-06-24/25 (ga, Architecture Deepening Campaign 2) restored a load-bearing piece of infrastructure AND shipped reviewable code — but neither fact licenses the claim 'the AFK loop is working'.

VERIFIED CLAIMS (evidence-bound):
1. Runner persistence was unblocked. The self-hosted GitHub Actions runner (AW-STEF) could not start as a service because NETWORK SERVICE cannot traverse the C:/Users/spare profile path. Fix: a logon Scheduled Task 'GitHubActionsRunner-AW-STEF' that runs as the user — no service account, no stored password, survives reboot. Net effect: unattended CI now actually runs. Evidence: ga reference_github_runner_network_service_profile (RESOLVED 2026-06-24).
2. Two deepening slices shipped as reviewable PRs under a SUPERVISED drive: ga#475 ChordClassificationEngine (one mood/style tag authority behind a small Classify(ctx) interface; collapsed divergent classifiers across VoicingTagEnricher / VoicingHarmonicAnalyzer) and ga#476 ConfigFileLocator (one path-probe seam for 10 F# config modules). Both green on CI; #475 was merged by the human (the harness classifier correctly refused agent self-merge of its own PR). Evidence: docs/plans/2026-06-23-arch-deepening-campaign-2-plan.md; merges 2026-06-25T03Z.

WHAT IS NOT YET TRUE (do not claim):
- The loop is NOT unattended end-to-end. Every merge of the agent's own PR required a human hand on the trigger; 'manage it all' / 'ok do it' did NOT clear the self-merge boundary — only a direct 'merge it' or a human-added 'Bash(gh pr merge:*)' settings rule does.
- Fuzzy-quality gates remain human/tribunal-gated by design. Only the binary oracle (CI green/red) ran autonomously.

GENERALIZABLE RULE: gate any 'autonomy is working' signal on (a) which oracle actually ran (binary CI vs fuzzy quality), and (b) whether a human was in the merge/approval path. Report the restored capability and the supervised capability as two separate facts. Inflating supervised throughput into autonomous capability is a confidence-inflation failure mode the estimator pairing exists to catch.

source.reconnaissance: ga#475, ga#476, ga#477 merged 2026-06-25T03Z; runner fix RESOLVED 2026-06-24
